# Soft51 Handoff42 Swarm450 Contract

## Soft 51
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.51 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Handoff 42
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.42 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Swarm 450
swarm expert bodies default to 450 chars, total 14k, inline 80 for denser multi-agent handoffs

## Evidence path
